2604.25740.title: QAROO: AI-Driven Online Task Offloading for Energy-Efficient and Sustainable MEC Networks
2604.25740.paper_summary: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) and intelligent science, intelligent edge computing has been widely adopted. However, the limitations of traditional methods, such as poor adaptability and the slow convergence of heuristic algorithms, are becoming increasingly evident. To enable sustainable and resource-efficient edge applications, this paper proposes an online task offloading framework for wireless powered mobile edge computing (MEC) networks, called Quantum Attention-based Reinforcement learning for Online Offloading (QAROO). The system employs a binary offloading strategy with the aim of co-optimizing computing and energy resources in dynamic channel environments. In response to the issues of poor adaptability in traditional approaches and the slow convergence of heuristic algorithms, the framework integrates quantum neural networks and attention mechanisms, introducing three key improvements: using recurrent neural networks to enhance temporal modeling capability, proposing an uncertainty-guided quantization method to improve exploration efficiency, and incorporating attention mechanisms into quantum networks to strengthen feature representation. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms comparative schemes in terms of normalized computation speed and processing time, offering an efficient and stable solution for online task offloading in large-scale Internet of Things (IoT) dynamic environments.
2604.25740.paper_summary_zh: 隨著人工智慧 (AI) 和智能科學的快速發展，智能邊緣計算已被廣泛採用。<lb/>然而，傳統方法的局限性，如適應性差和啟發式算法的收斂速度慢，正變得越來越明顯。<lb/>為了實現可持續和資源高效的邊緣應用，本文提出了一種針對無線供電移動邊緣計算 (MEC) 網絡的在線任務卸載框架，稱為基於量子注意力的強化學習在線卸載 (QAROO)。<lb/>該系統採用二元卸載策略，旨在在動態信道環境中共同優化計算和能源資源。<lb/>為了應對傳統方法適應性差和啟發式算法收斂速度慢的問題，該框架整合了量子神經網絡和注意力機制，提出了三個關鍵改進：使用循環神經網絡來增強時間建模能力，提出一種不確定性引導的量化方法以提高探索效率，並將注意力機制納入量子網絡以加強特徵表示。<lb/>實驗結果表明，所提出的方法在標準化計算速度和處理時間方面優於比較方案，為大規模物聯網 (IoT) 動態環境中的在線任務卸載提供了一個高效且穩定的解決方案。
2604.25740.author: Yongtao Yao et.al.
2604.25740.authors: Yongtao Yao, Yao Yang, Haorui Shi, Canglu Zhu, Miaojiang Chen, Ahmed Farouk
